# serval_tag (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "serval_tag" "example_tag" {
  name = "name"
  team_id = "teamId"
  color = "color"
  icon_slug = "iconSlug"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the tag.
- `team_id` (String) The ID of the team to create the tag for.

### Optional

- `color` (String) The color of the tag (CSS color string).
- `icon_slug` (String) The icon slug for the tag.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the tag.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
$ terraform import serval_tag.example '<id>'
```
